subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou art my impregnable refuge, my lofty sanctuary, my succour, my shelter and my haven. Unto Thee do I supplicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ملجای المنیع و ملاذی الرفیع و غیاثی و عیاذی و ملاذی انی اتضرع الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
